entities.name: PEARLMILLET
entities.description: An important cereal crop of the semi arid-tropical region.

entities.name: SEMI ARID-TROPICAL REGION
entities.description: The region where pearlmillet is primarily grown.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output, which is challenged in most cultivable regions.

entities.name: DRY REGIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where crop productivity needs enhancement.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among different genotypes of a crop.

entities.name: GERMPLASM LINES
entities.description: The 243 genetic materials used to assess divergence in pearlmillet.

entities.name: MAHALANOBIS D² STATISTIC
entities.description: A statistical method used to assess genetic divergence among germplasm lines.

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: The D2 value used to group genotypes into clusters.

entities.name: CLUSTERS
entities.description: Groups of genotypes formed based on genetic distance to indicate diversity.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: A character that contributed significantly to genetic divergence.

entities.name: PANICLE GIRTH
entities.description: A character that contributed significantly to genetic divergence.

entities.name: LEAF LENGTH
entities.description: A character that contributed significantly to genetic divergence.

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PROGRAMME
entities.description: A breeding approach for the improvement of pearlmillet genotypes based on inter-cluster distance.
